title: Pinned scroll section (sticky + horizontal track)
description: The landonorris.com chapter move: a section pins to the viewport (position:sticky) while a tall outer track scrolls past, and that scroll distance is mapped to a horizontal translate of an inner row — so vertical scrolling scrubs through panels left-to-right. Progress also drives a thin progress bar. CSS sticky does the pin; JS only maps progress to transform.
a11y: prefers-reduced-motion: track unpins and panels stack vertically (native scroll).
